infringements.steward_decision_summary: 2026 BELGIAN GRAND PRIX 17 - 19 July 2026 The driver and team representative are required to report to the Stewards at 14:25, in relation to the incident below: The Stewards From The Stewards To The Team Manager, Oracle Red Bull Racing Document 40 Date 18 July 2026 Time 14:09 No / Driver 3 - Max Ver

raw_text_excerpt:
2026 BELGIAN GRAND PRIX
17 - 19 July 2026
The driver and team representative are required to report to the Stewards at 14:25, in relation to the
incident below: 
 
The Stewards
From The Stewards
To The Team Manager,
Oracle Red Bull Racing
Document 40
Date 18 July 2026
Time 14:09
No / Driver 3 - Max Verstappen
Reason Alleged breaches by Car 55 of Appendix H, Article 2.5.5 b) of the International
Sporting Code and B1.8.4b of the FIA F1 Regulations – Failing to slow under yellow
flags at 13:33
Gerd Ennser Matthew Selley
Alfonso Orihuela Pedro Lamy
Loïc Bacquelaine
